name: Barley Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine dry ingredients in a large bowl.
2. In another bowl, mix the liquid ingredients thoroughly.
3. Gradually add the dry mixture to the liquid mixture and stir until moist, but not smooth.
4. Stir in the pecans.
5. Fill well-oiled muffin cups about 2/3 full.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
(Yield: 24 small or 12 large muffins)
